name: managed-ha-opentofu-state
candidate_class: managed or appliance HA S3-compatible state service
s3_endpoint_shape: tailnet-only or provider-private S3-compatible HTTPS endpoint dedicated to OpenTofu state proofs; actual URL is supplied by a non-secret endpoint package and may only be overridden when the override matches that package
audience: Tinyland infrastructure operators and repo-managed OpenTofu workflows only
credential_source: dedicated state-only secret authority, not Attic cache, Bazel cache, BCR mirror, or RBE CAS/action-cache credentials
read_write_scope: candidate scratch buckets and later state-only buckets; no access to the active tofu-state bucket during proof

bucket_recovery.versioning: bucket versioning or equivalent object-generation history is enabled before any protected migration
bucket_recovery.retention_or_backup: daily retained backup or managed retention covers the state-only bucket independently from Attic and Bazel cache storage
bucket_recovery.restore_test: scratch object restore and disposable OpenTofu state restore are required before protected migration

state_locking: OpenTofu S3 native lockfile mode must be enabled and observed with the repo OpenTofu version before protected migration

failure_behavior.endpoint_loss: two ready endpoints, multi-node quorum, or a managed HA equivalent must keep S3 head/list/read/write available through one endpoint loss
failure_behavior.node_or_failure_domain_loss: managed multi-zone semantics, appliance multi-node quorum, or equivalent managed HA must keep the candidate available through one node maintenance event

bucket_index_divergence_response: backend-managed recovery removes the current RustFS bucket-index failure class, or the appliance proof must document and exercise non-destructive admin/heal/index repair before migration
authority_separation: Attic cache is not OpenTofu state authority
Bazel cache is not OpenTofu state authority
BCR and Bzlmod mirrors are not OpenTofu state authority
RBE CAS and action-cache are separate future authorities and are not backed by this state bucket
proof_plan: credential boundary proof uses just ha-state-credential-boundary-check <endpoint-package.json> before mutating scratch or disposable proof
scratch S3 proof uses the non-state bucket from just ha-state-candidate-proof --endpoint-package <endpoint-package.json> --phase baseline --checkpoint-file <path>
disposable OpenTofu proof uses just ha-state-candidate-proof --endpoint-package <endpoint-package.json> --run-disposable-tofu before protected state
restart verification is captured through the checkpoint flow or a managed maintenance equivalent
node maintenance verification is captured through one node or failure-domain event or a managed HA equivalent
protected_state_migration: blocked until scratch and disposable proofs pass; protected migration then proceeds one stack at a time
